message:
Running command: # Check what the DRT step ODB has for VDDIO before trying to fix
WRAPPER_RUN="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

# Check DRT log for more details
echo "=== DRT log error context ==="
cat "$WRAPPER_RUN/69-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log" 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo ""
echo "=== Look for VDDIO in DRT step state_in ==="
python3 -c "
import json
with open('$WRAPPER_RUN/69-openroad-detailedrouting/state_in.json') as f:
    d = json.load(f)
print('state_in keys:', list(d.keys()))
print('odb:', d.get('odb'))
" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "=== Check LibreLane's DRT script for dont_route option ==="
cat /nix/store/zkzv2pzi9yp00dmvlcvkdh2kxykicfqk-python3.13-librelane-3.0.2/lib/python3.13/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/drt.tcl 2>/dev/null | head -50
